title: cirsium distans
intro: Cirsium distans, also known as the distant thistle, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cirsium distans are thought to include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the flowers and leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and processing the plant material into capsules or tinctures.
